summary: Completed full backend and frontend testing of BotForge MVP. All 11 backend API tests passed. All 7 admin pages load correctly, chat and widget work, FAQ entry can be added. Minor routing note: Bot Settings is at /admin/settings not /admin/bot-settings.

issues: Dark theme looks good, good contrast throughout

critical_code_review_comments: Bot Settings route is /admin/settings (not /admin/bot-settings) - this is correct per App.js but review_request mentioned /admin/bot-settings which may confuse future agents
server.py is 551 lines - approaching the 700-line threshold, consider splitting into modules as app grows
llm_sessions dict in memory - sessions won't persist across server restarts, consider storing in MongoDB if persistence is needed

success_rate.frontend: 100% - all pages load, chat works, widget works, knowledge base FAQ add works

seed_data_creation: None - test FAQ entries were created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All routes verified: /admin (Dashboard), /admin/knowledge, /admin/conversations, /admin/settings (BotSettings), /admin/analytics, /admin/discord, /admin/embed. Public routes: /chat, /widget. Backend 100% passing. Chat sends to Claude and receives response. Widget functional.
